name: Muffuletta Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Green olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
2/3 cup Black olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the olive salad by mixing together all ingredients and letting it marinate for at least 12 hours.
2. Slice a loaf of Italian bread in half horizontally and slightly scoop out some of the insides.
3. Layer the sliced salami, ham, and provolone on top of the bread.
4. Spread the prepared olive salad on the bread, ensuring it is spread at least 3/4-inch thick.
5. Replace the top half of the bread and serve.
Note: The original recipe text included instructions to "replace the top half" but did not specify this as a separate step in the numbered list.
